creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 180861
fix fetch and update to 1.0.1

devel/fuel appears to have been abandoned. Fuel has its own website from which current versions as well as the old 0.9.6 version are available, so the Google Code BROKENess is easily remedied.

The current version supports QT5, so an option has been added to choose QT4 or QT5, with the latter as the default.

Also, install an icon and working .desktop file, update WWW, and sync COMMENT in Makefile with Comment in .desktop file.

QA: Poudriere 10.3/11.0 amd64/i386 QT4/QT5 OK
